# QA Plan: Godot Client Engineering

**Date**: 2026-05-27
**Generated by**: CCGS `/qa-plan` workflow adapted for Codex
**Scope**: 12 stories in `production/epics/godot-client-engineering`
**Engine**: Godot 4.4 target, validated locally with Godot 4.6.3 console
**Sprint File**: Not present; scope resolved from `production/epics/godot-client-engineering/EPIC.md`
**Primary Validation Command**: `npm.cmd run check`

---

## Test Summary

| Story | Type | Automated Test Required | Manual Verification Required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 001 Extract Player API Bridge | Integration | `npm.cmd run check`, `npm.cmd run check:godot`, API route contract checks | Launch client, confirm state fetch/action failures leave usable fallback UI |
| 002 Extract Page Flow State | Integration | `npm.cmd run check`, Godot prototype scan for page/sub-view ownership | Start with page/sub-view args and navigate bottom tabs |
| 003 Extract Player State Mapper | Integration | `npm.cmd run check`, Godot prototype scan for player-safe state mapping | Confirm HUD/page values match player-safe backend state |
| 004 Extract HUD Presenter | Integration | `npm.cmd run check`, Godot prototype scan for HUD presenter boundary | Confirm top HUD and visibility rules remain unchanged |
| 005 Extract Quest Status Presenter | Integration | `npm.cmd run check`, Godot prototype scan for quest/status delegation and home filtering | Confirm quest/status text appears and home does not show pack/trade progress |
| 006 Extract Feature Page Renderer | Integration | `npm.cmd run check`, Godot prototype scan for feature renderer delegation | Confirm home is content-free and feature pages refresh correctly |
| 007 Pack Page Live State Binding | Integration | `npm.cmd run check`, Godot prototype scan for `PackPageStateBinder` | Confirm pack cards and focus card reflect live/local updates |
| 008 Market Page Live State Binding | Integration | `npm.cmd run check`, Godot prototype scan for `MarketPageStateBinder` | Confirm market rows and session display remain backend-driven |
| 009 Role/Equipment Live Binding | Integration | `npm.cmd run check`, Godot prototype scan for `RoleEquipmentStateBinder` | Confirm role/equipment state and paper doll display stay consistent |
| 010 Inventory/Skills Live Binding | Integration | `npm.cmd run check`, Godot prototype scan for `InventorySkillStateBinder` | Confirm inventory and skill lists reflect live/local updates |
| 011 Challenge/Guild/System Live Binding | Integration | `npm.cmd run check`, Godot prototype scan for `ChallengeGuildSystemStateBinder` | Confirm challenge, guild, and system pages render normalized state |
| 012 Cleanup Unreachable Fallback Render Blocks | Integration | `npm.cmd run check`, validator rejection for dead `_add_visual_grid` fallback blocks | Confirm live feature renderers still render expected content |

---

## Automated Tests Required

### Project-Level Gate

**Command**: `npm.cmd run check`

This is the project-local acceptance gate from `.claude/docs/technical-preferences.md`. It covers:

- Encoding validation
- Planning document validation
- API contract validation for 48 routes
- Godot prototype validation
- Seven goal acceptance validation
- Art toolchain and production art asset validation
- Node test suite under `test/`
- UI smoke, API smoke, and production smoke

**Note**: Upstream CCGS smoke-check expects `tests/`, but this project uses `test/` plus explicit validation scripts. QA reports must use the project-local convention rather than treating `tests/` absence as no test coverage.

### Godot Static and Runtime Validation

**Static command**:

```powershell
& "tools\godot-4.6.3\Godot_v4.6.3-stable_win64_console.exe" --headless --log-file "C:\Users\User\幸運禮包MMORPG遊戲\tmp\godot-validation\main-script-check.log" --path "godot-client" --check-only --script "res://scripts/Main.gd"
```

**Project load command**:

```powershell
& "tools\godot-4.6.3\Godot_v4.6.3-stable_win64_console.exe" --headless --log-file "C:\Users\User\幸運禮包MMORPG遊戲\tmp\godot-validation\project-load.log" --path "godot-client" --quit
```

**Runtime boot command**:

```powershell
& "tools\godot-4.6.3\Godot_v4.6.3-stable_win64_console.exe" --headless --log-file "C:\Users\User\幸運禮包MMORPG遊戲\tmp\godot-validation\main-scene-run.log" --path "godot-client" --quit-after 3
```

Expected result: all commands exit 0 and logs contain no GDScript parse or runtime startup errors.

### Windows Package Smoke

**Package command**:

```powershell
npm.cmd run godot:package:windows
```

**Export runtime smoke**:

```powershell
& "build\windows\LuckyPackMMORPG.console.exe" --headless --log-file "C:\Users\User\幸運禮包MMORPG遊戲\tmp\godot-validation\windows-export-run.log" --quit-after 3 -- --api-base=https://lucky-pack-api-production.up.railway.app
```

Expected result: `build/windows/LuckyPackMMORPG.exe`, `LuckyPackMMORPG.console.exe`, `Play-Lucky-Pack-Online.cmd`, and `README-INTERNAL-TEST.md` exist; export runtime exits 0.

---

## Story-Specific Automated Checks

| Story | Required Automated Checks |
| --- | --- |
| 001 | Validate API request construction, completion routing, `/api/player/state`, `/api/player/action`, `/api/player/simulate-payment`, and fallback-safe failure handling remain covered by scripts. |
| 002 | Validate page and sub-view ownership remains outside ad hoc `Main.gd` conditionals and startup args still reference supported page keys. |
| 003 | Validate player-safe payload fields are mapped outside `Main.gd` and no operator settlement/withdrawal state is consumed by Godot-facing code. |
| 004 | Validate HUD visibility and presenter delegation are enforced without changing top-level orchestration. |
| 005 | Validate quest/status presenter delegation and home feed filtering, especially no pack/trade progress on home. |
| 006 | Validate feature page renderer dispatch and home skip behavior remain present. |
| 007 | Validate pack page live-state rendering and focus-card synchronization through `PackPageStateBinder`. |
| 008 | Validate market page live-state rendering and row/session synchronization through `MarketPageStateBinder`. |
| 009 | Validate role/equipment live-state rendering and local/backend synchronization through `RoleEquipmentStateBinder`. |
| 010 | Validate inventory/skill live-state rendering and local/backend list synchronization through `InventorySkillStateBinder`. |
| 011 | Validate challenge, guild, and system live-state rendering plus local action synchronization through `ChallengeGuildSystemStateBinder`. |
| 012 | Validate dead fallback `_add_visual_grid` render blocks cannot be reintroduced after live render returns. |

---

## Manual QA Checklist

### Core Stability

- [ ] Run `build/windows/Play-Lucky-Pack-Online.cmd`.
- [ ] Confirm the client opens in a 432x768 windowed portrait layout.
- [ ] Confirm the first visible screen does not crash, hang, or show missing critical UI.
- [ ] Confirm bottom navigation accepts mouse input for desktop internal testing.
- [ ] Confirm fallback state keeps the UI usable if backend state fetch fails.

### Home Screen and HUD

- [ ] Confirm top HUD remains visible and readable.
- [ ] Confirm character stage, scene, quest/status panel, enemy target, status log, and function menu are visible.
- [ ] Confirm home screen does not show pack progress, trade progress, listing prices, or market rows.
- [ ] Confirm HUD visibility does not regress while moving between feature pages.

### Feature Pages

- [ ] Pack page: pack cards, focus card, open/list/buy-related state, and local updates remain coherent.
- [ ] Market page: market rows and trading session status are backend-driven and readable.
- [ ] Role page: role/equipment state and paper doll display remain consistent after local role actions.
- [ ] Inventory page: inventory list reflects current normalized player state.
- [ ] Skills page: skill list and upgrade/reset-related state reflect normalized player state.
- [ ] Challenge page: challenge state renders without requiring economy logic in Godot.
- [ ] Guild page: guild state renders without exposing operator workflows.
- [ ] System page: system/status state renders without player-facing financial settlement data.

### Boundaries and Regression Checks

- [ ] No withdrawable value, settlement approval, payout, tax, or operator-only workflow appears in Godot player screens.
- [ ] Player actions route through documented player-safe API endpoints.
- [ ] Imported production art remains visible; no player-facing feature page is replaced by web/CSS-style placeholder UI.
- [ ] No obvious text overlap in the 432x768 portrait viewport.
- [ ] Page transitions do not create visible stale rows, duplicated cards, or broken focus state.

---

## Smoke Test Scope

Critical paths to verify before QA hand-off:

1. Godot client launches without crash.
2. Main scene loads at 432x768 portrait size.
3. Player-safe API state fetch does not crash the client.
4. Bottom navigation reaches home, pack, market, role, inventory, skills, challenge, guild, and system pages.
5. Home remains free of pack and trade progress.
6. Pack, market, role/equipment, inventory/skills, challenge/guild/system pages render normalized live or fallback state.
7. Windows internal package boots with the deployed player-safe API base URL.
8. `npm.cmd run check` passes after packaging.

---

## Playtest Requirements

No formal playtest sessions are required for this engineering refactor before QA hand-off. This work is behavior-preserving modularization plus feature-page live-state binding.

Recommended internal visual pass:

| Story Area | Playtest Goal | Min Sessions | Target Player Type |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Godot client navigation | Verify a tester can move across all pages without confusion or broken state | 1 | Internal tester |
| Feature page readability | Verify page data remains readable in 432x768 portrait mode | 1 | Internal tester |

Evidence can be recorded as screenshots or notes under `production/qa/evidence/` if issues are found.

---

## Definition of Done - Godot Client Engineering QA

- [ ] `npm.cmd run check` passes.
- [ ] Godot script parse check passes.
- [ ] Godot project load check passes.
- [ ] Godot main scene runtime boot check passes.
- [ ] Windows package smoke passes.
- [ ] Manual visual QA confirms 432x768 portrait layout is usable.
- [ ] Manual QA confirms home screen does not leak pack/trade progress.
- [ ] Manual QA confirms feature pages render normalized state without operator-only workflows.
- [ ] Formal smoke-check report is written after user approval.
- [ ] QA sign-off notes any accepted residual risk before the next epic begins.
